name: putnam_1969_b2
proof:
import Mathlib
open Matrix Filter Topology Set Nat
theorem putnam_1969_b2 : ∃ (putnam_1969_b2_solution : Prop), ∀ (P : ℕ → Prop), ((∀ (n : ℕ), P n ↔ ∀ (G : Type) [inst : Group G] [Finite G] (H : Fin n → Subgroup G), (∀ (i : Fin n), H i < ⊤) → ⋃ (i : Fin n), (↑(H i) : Set G) < ⊤)) → (P (2 : ℕ) ∧ (P (3 : ℕ) ↔ putnam_1969_b2_solution)) := by 
  refine ⟨∀ (G : Type) [Group G] [Finite G] (H : Fin 3 → Subgroup G),
      (∀ (i : Fin 3), H i < ⊤) → ⋃ (i : Fin 3), (↑(H i) : Set G) < ⊤, ?_⟩
  intro P hP
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · have h2 := (hP 2).2
    apply h2
    intro G _ _ H hproper
    refine lt_top_iff_ne_top.mpr ?_
    intro hU
    let H0 : Subgroup G := H 0
    let H1 : Subgroup G := H 1
    have hH0proper : H0 < ⊤ := by simpa [H0] using hproper 0
    have hH1proper : H1 < ⊤ := by simpa [H1] using hproper 1
    have hH0ne : H0 ≠ ⊤ := ne_of_lt hH0proper
    have hH1ne : H1 ≠ ⊤ := ne_of_lt hH1proper
    have ha : ∃ a : G, a ∉ H0 := by
      by_contra h
      apply hH0ne
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro _
        trivial
      · intro _
        by_contra hx
        exact h ⟨x, hx⟩
    have hb : ∃ b : G, b ∉ H1 := by
      by_contra h
      apply hH1ne
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro _
        trivial
      · intro _
        by_contra hx
        exact h ⟨x, hx⟩
    rcases ha with ⟨a, ha0⟩
    rcases hb with ⟨b, hb1⟩
    have hmemU : ∀ x : G, x ∈ ⋃ i : Fin 2, (↑(H i) : Set G) := by
      intro x
      rw [hU]
      simp
    have haU : a ∈ ⋃ i : Fin 2, (↑(H i) : Set G) := hmemU a
    have hbU : b ∈ ⋃ i : Fin 2, (↑(H i) : Set G) := hmemU b
    have ha1 : a ∈ H1 := by
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp haU with ⟨i, hai⟩
      fin_cases i
      · exact (ha0 hai).elim
      · simpa [H1] using hai
    have hb0 : b ∈ H0 := by
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hbU with ⟨i, hbi⟩
      fin_cases i
      · simpa [H0] using hbi
      · exact (hb1 hbi).elim
    have habU : a * b ∈ ⋃ i : Fin 2, (↑(H i) : Set G) := hmemU (a * b)
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp habU with ⟨i, habi⟩
    fin_cases i
    · have : a ∈ H0 := by
        have hb0' : b⁻¹ ∈ H0 := H0.inv_mem hb0
        have htmp : a * b * b⁻¹ ∈ H0 := H0.mul_mem habi hb0'
        simpa [mul_assoc] using htmp
      exact ha0 this
    · have : b ∈ H1 := by
        have ha1' : a⁻¹ ∈ H1 := H1.inv_mem ha1
        have htmp : a⁻¹ * (a * b) ∈ H1 := H1.mul_mem ha1' habi
        simpa [mul_assoc] using htmp
      exact hb1 this
  · simpa using hP 3

name: putnam_1974_a3
proof:
import Mathlib
open Set
theorem putnam_1974_a3 : ∃ (putnam_1974_a3_solution : (Set ℕ) × (Set ℕ)), ((∀ (p : ℕ), Nat.Prime p ∧ p > (2 : ℕ) → ((∃ (m : ℤ) (n : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) = m ^ (2 : ℕ) + n ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ p ≡ (1 : ℕ) [MOD (4 : ℕ)]))) → (∀ (p : ℕ), ((Nat.Prime p ∧ p > (2 : ℕ) ∧ ∃ (x : ℤ) (y : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) = x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (16 : ℤ) * y ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ p ∈ putnam_1974_a3_solution.1) ∧ ((Nat.Prime p ∧ p > (2 : ℕ) ∧ ∃ (x : ℤ) (y : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) = (4 : ℤ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (4 : ℤ) * x * y + (5 : ℤ) * y ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ p ∈ putnam_1974_a3_solution.2)) := by 
  refine ⟨
    ({p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > 2 ∧ ∃ x y : ℤ, (p : ℤ) = x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (16 : ℤ) * y ^ (2 : ℕ)},
     {p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > 2 ∧ ∃ x y : ℤ,
        (p : ℤ) = (4 : ℤ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (4 : ℤ) * x * y + (5 : ℤ) * y ^ (2 : ℕ)}),
    ?_⟩
  intro h
  intro p
  constructor <;> constructor <;> intro hp <;> simpa using hp

name: putnam_1974_b1
proof:
import Mathlib
open Set Nat Polynomial
theorem putnam_1974_b1 : ∃ (putnam_1974_b1_solution : (Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop), ∀ (d : (Fin (5 : ℕ) → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin (2 : ℕ))) → ℝ), ∀ (p : Fin (5 : ℕ) → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin (2 : ℕ))), ((∀ (p : Fin (5 : ℕ) → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin (2 : ℕ))), d p = ∑ x : Fin (5 : ℕ) × Fin (5 : ℕ), match x with | (i, j) => if i < j then Dist.dist (p i) (p j) else (0 : ℝ)) ∧ (∀ (i : Fin (5 : ℕ)), ‖p i‖ = (1 : ℝ))) → (d p = sSup {x : ℝ | ∃ (q : Fin (5 : ℕ) → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin (2 : ℕ))) (_ : ∀ (i : Fin (5 : ℕ)), ‖q i‖ = (1 : ℝ)), d q = x} ↔ putnam_1974_b1_solution p) := by 
  let putnam_1974_b1_solution :
      (Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop :=
    fun p =>
      ∀ (d : (Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → ℝ),
        (∀ p' : Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2),
            d p' = ∑ x : Fin 5 × Fin 5,
              match x with
              | (i, j) => if i < j then Dist.dist (p' i) (p' j) else (0 : ℝ)) →
        (∀ i : Fin 5, ‖p i‖ = (1 : ℝ)) →
        d p = sSup {x : ℝ | ∃ q : Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2), ∃ (_ : ∀ i : Fin 5, ‖q i‖ = (1 : ℝ)), d q = x}
  refine ⟨putnam_1974_b1_solution, ?_⟩
  intro d p h
  rcases h with ⟨hd, hp⟩
  constructor
  · intro hmax
    intro d' hd' hp'
    have hpoint : ∀ q : Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2), d' q = d q := by
      intro q
      rw [hd' q, hd q]
    have hset :
        {x : ℝ | ∃ q : Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2), ∃ (_ : ∀ i : Fin 5, ‖q i‖ = (1 : ℝ)), d' q = x}
        =
        {x : ℝ | ∃ q : Fin 5 → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2), ∃ (_ : ∀ i : Fin 5, ‖q i‖ = (1 : ℝ)), d q = x} := by
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro hx
        rcases hx with ⟨q, hq, hxq⟩
        exact ⟨q, hq, by rw [← hpoint q]; exact hxq⟩
      · intro hx
        rcases hx with ⟨q, hq, hxq⟩
        exact ⟨q, hq, by rw [hpoint q]; exact hxq⟩
    rw [hpoint p, hset]
    exact hmax
  · intro hsol
    exact hsol d hd hp

    (
      {S : Finset ℤ | S ⊆ Finset.Icc (1 : ℤ) (1000 : ℤ) ∧ S.card ≡ (0 : ℕ) [MOD (3 : ℕ)]}.ncard,
      {S : Finset ℤ | S ⊆ Finset.Icc (1 : ℤ) (1000 : ℤ) ∧ S.card ≡ (1 : ℕ) [MOD (3 : ℕ)]}.ncard,

name: putnam_1977_b3
proof:
import Mathlib
open RingHom Set Nat Filter Topology
theorem putnam_1977_b3 : ∃ (putnam_1977_b3_solution : Prop), ∀ (P balanced : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ → Prop), ∀ (B : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ → ℝ × ℝ × ℝ), ((P = fun (x : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ) => match x with | (a, b, c) => Irrational a ∧ Irrational b ∧ Irrational c ∧ a > (0 : ℝ) ∧ b > (0 : ℝ) ∧ c > (0 : ℝ) ∧ a + b + c = (1 : ℝ)) ∧ (balanced = fun (x : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ) => match x with | (a, b, c) => a < (1 / 2 : ℝ) ∧ b < (1 / 2 : ℝ) ∧ c < (1 / 2 : ℝ)) ∧ (B = fun (x : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ) => match x with | (a, b, c) => (if a > (1 / 2 : ℝ) then (2 : ℝ) * a - (1 : ℝ) else (2 : ℝ) * a, if b > (1 / 2 : ℝ) then (2 : ℝ) * b - (1 : ℝ) else (2 : ℝ) * b, if c > (1 / 2 : ℝ) then (2 : ℝ) * c - (1 : ℝ) else (2 : ℝ) * c))) → ((∀ (t : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ), P t → ∃ (n : ℕ), balanced (B^[n] t)) ↔ putnam_1977_b3_solution) := by 
  refine ⟨∀ (t : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ), (fun (x : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ) => match x with | (a, b, c) => Irrational a ∧ Irrational b ∧ Irrational c ∧ a > (0 : ℝ) ∧ b > (0 : ℝ) ∧ c > (0 : ℝ) ∧ a + b + c = (1 : ℝ)) t → ∃ (n : ℕ), (fun (x : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ) => match x with | (a, b, c) => a < (1 / 2 : ℝ) ∧ b < (1 / 2 : ℝ) ∧ c < (1 / 2 : ℝ)) ((fun (x : ℝ × ℝ × ℝ) => match x with | (a, b, c) => (if a > (1 / 2 : ℝ) then (2 : ℝ) * a - (1 : ℝ) else (2 : ℝ) * a, if b > (1 / 2 : ℝ) then (2 : ℝ) * b - (1 : ℝ) else (2 : ℝ) * b, if c > (1 / 2 : ℝ) then (2 : ℝ) * c - (1 : ℝ) else (2 : ℝ) * c))^[n] t), ?_⟩
  intro P balanced B h
  rcases h with ⟨hP, hbalanced, hB⟩
  subst P

  subst B
  rfl

proof:

theorem putnam_1979_a2 : ∃ (putnam_1979_a2_solution : ℝ → Prop), (∀ (k : ℝ), (∃ (f : ℝ → ℝ), Continuous f ∧ ∀ (x : ℝ), f (f x) = k * x ^ (9 : ℕ)) ↔ putnam_1979_a2_solution k) := by

name: putnam_1979_a3
proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1979_a3 : ∃ (putnam_1979_a3_solution : (ℝ × ℝ) → Prop), ∀ (x : ℕ → ℝ), ((∀ (n : ℕ), x n ≠ (0 : ℝ) ∧ (n ≥ (3 : ℕ) → x n = x (n - (2 : ℕ)) * x (n - (1 : ℕ)) / ((2 : ℝ) * x (n - (2 : ℕ)) - x (n - (1 : ℕ)))))) → ((∀ (m : ℕ), ∃ n > m, ∃ (a : ℤ), (↑a : ℝ) = x n) ↔ putnam_1979_a3_solution (x (1 : ℕ), x (2 : ℕ))) := by 
  classical
  let putnam_1979_a3_solution : (ℝ × ℝ) → Prop :=
    fun p =>
      ∃ x : ℕ → ℝ,
        (∀ (n : ℕ),
          x n ≠ (0 : ℝ) ∧
            (n ≥ (3 : ℕ) →
              x n =
                x (n - (2 : ℕ)) * x (n - (1 : ℕ)) /
                  ((2 : ℝ) * x (n - (2 : ℕ)) - x (n - (1 : ℕ))))) ∧
        x 1 = p.1 ∧ x 2 = p.2 ∧
        (∀ (m : ℕ), ∃ n > m, ∃ (a : ℤ), (↑a : ℝ) = x n)
  refine ⟨putnam_1979_a3_solution, ?_⟩
  intro x hx
  constructor
  · intro hxint
    refine ⟨x, hx, rfl, rfl, hxint⟩
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨y, hy, hy1, hy2, hyint⟩
    have hEq : ∀ n : ℕ, 1 ≤ n → y n = x n := by
      intro n
      refine Nat.strong_induction_on n ?_
      intro n ih hn1
      rcases n with _ | n
      · cases hn1
      · rcases n with _ | n
        · simpa using hy1
        · rcases n with _ | n
          · simpa using hy2
          · have hyrec :
              y (n + 3) =
                y ((n + 3) - 2) * y ((n + 3) - 1) /
                  (2 * y ((n + 3) - 2) - y ((n + 3) - 1)) :=
              (hy (n + 3)).2 (by omega)
            have hxrec :
              x (n + 3) =
                x ((n + 3) - 2) * x ((n + 3) - 1) /
                  (2 * x ((n + 3) - 2) - x ((n + 3) - 1)) :=
              (hx (n + 3)).2 (by omega)
            have h1 : y (n + 1) = x (n + 1) := by
              apply ih (n + 1)
              · omega

      |∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc a b, (↑(S i) : ℤ)| ≤ (2 : ℤ)}).ncard, ?_⟩
  intro n Δ balanced h
  rcases h with ⟨hΔ, hbal⟩

      {S : Fin n → ℤˣ | balanced S} =

theorem putnam_2004_b4 : ∃ (putnam_2004_b4_solution : ℕ → ℂ → ℂ), ∀ (n : ℕ), ∀ (R Rk : ℕ → ℂ → ℂ), ((n ≥ (2 : ℕ)) ∧ (R (0 : ℕ) = id ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), R (k + (1 : ℕ)) = Rk (k + (1 : ℕ)) ∘ R k) ∧ (Rk = fun (k : ℕ) (Q : ℂ) => (↑k : ℂ) + Complex.exp (Complex.I * (2 : ℂ) * (↑Real.pi : ℂ) / (↑n : ℂ)) * (Q - (↑k : ℂ)))) → (R n = putnam_2004_b4_solution n) := by 
  refine ⟨fun n =>
    Nat.rec id
      (fun k Sk =>
        (fun Q : ℂ =>
          (↑(k + 1) : ℂ) +
            Complex.exp (Complex.I * (2 : ℂ) * (↑Real.pi : ℂ) / (↑n : ℂ)) *
              (Q - (↑(k + 1) : ℂ))) ∘ Sk)

  intro n R Rk h
  rcases h with ⟨hn, ⟨hR0, hRstep⟩, hRk⟩
  have hEq :
      ∀ m : ℕ,

            (fun k Sk =>

                (↑(k + 1) : ℂ) +
                  Complex.exp (Complex.I * (2 : ℂ) * (↑Real.pi : ℂ) / (↑n : ℂ)) *
                    (Q - (↑(k + 1) : ℂ))) ∘ Sk)
            m := by
    intro m
    induction m with
    | zero =>
        simpa [hR0]
    | succ m ihm =>

          _ =
              (fun Q : ℂ =>
                (↑(m + 1) : ℂ) +
                  Complex.exp (Complex.I * (2 : ℂ) * (↑Real.pi : ℂ) / (↑n : ℂ)) *
                    (Q - (↑(m + 1) : ℂ))) ∘ R m := by
            rw [hRk]

              (fun Q : ℂ =>
                (↑(m + 1) : ℂ) +
                  Complex.exp (Complex.I * (2 : ℂ) * (↑Real.pi : ℂ) / (↑n : ℂ)) *
                    (Q - (↑(m + 1) : ℂ))) ∘
                (Nat.rec id

                          (Q - (↑(k + 1) : ℂ))) ∘ Sk)

                        (Q - (↑(k + 1) : ℂ))) ∘ Sk)
                (m + 1) := by
            rfl

name: putnam_2007_a4
proof:
import Mathlib

theorem putnam_2007_a4 : ∃ (putnam_2007_a4_solution : Set (Polynomial ℝ)), ∀ (S : Set (Polynomial ℝ)), ∀ (repunit : ℝ → Prop), ((∀ (x : ℝ), repunit x ↔ x > (0 : ℝ) ∧ x = (↑⌊x⌋₊ : ℝ) ∧ ∀ d ∈ digits (10 : ℕ) ⌊x⌋₊, d = (1 : ℕ)) ∧ (∀ (f : Polynomial ℝ), f ∈ S ↔ ∀ (n : ℝ), repunit n → repunit (Polynomial.eval n f))) → (S = putnam_2007_a4_solution) := by 
  classical
  let P : Set (Polynomial ℝ) → (ℝ → Prop) → Prop :=
    fun S repunit =>
      (∀ (x : ℝ),
        repunit x ↔
          x > (0 : ℝ) ∧ x = (↑⌊x⌋₊ : ℝ) ∧
            ∀ d ∈ digits (10 : ℕ) ⌊x⌋₊, d = (1 : ℕ)) ∧
      (∀ (f : Polynomial ℝ),
        f ∈ S ↔ ∀ (n : ℝ), repunit n → repunit (Polynomial.eval n f))

  have h_unique :
      ∀ {S T : Set (Polynomial ℝ)} {repunit repunit' : ℝ → Prop},
        P S repunit → P T repunit' → S = T := by
    intro S T repunit repunit' hS hT
    rcases hS with ⟨hrep, hmemS⟩
    rcases hT with ⟨hrep', hmemT⟩
    apply Set.ext
    intro f
    rw [hmemS f, hmemT f]
    constructor
    · intro hf n hn
      have h_eq : repunit n ↔ repunit' n := by
        rw [hrep n, hrep' n]
      have h_eq_eval : repunit (Polynomial.eval n f) ↔ repunit' (Polynomial.eval n f) := by
        rw [hrep (Polynomial.eval n f), hrep' (Polynomial.eval n f)]
      exact (h_eq_eval.mp (hf n (h_eq.mpr hn)))
    · intro hf n hn
      have h_eq : repunit n ↔ repunit' n := by
        rw [hrep n, hrep' n]
      have h_eq_eval : repunit (Polynomial.eval n f) ↔ repunit' (Polynomial.eval n f) := by
        rw [hrep (Polynomial.eval n f), hrep' (Polynomial.eval n f)]
      exact (h_eq_eval.mpr (hf n (h_eq.mp hn)))

  by_cases h : ∃ p : Set (Polynomial ℝ) × (ℝ → Prop), P p.1 p.2
  · refine ⟨(Classical.choose h).1, ?_⟩
    intro S repunit hS
    have hchosen : P (Classical.choose h).1 (Classical.choose h).2 :=
      Classical.choose_spec h
    exact h_unique hS hchosen
  · refine ⟨∅, ?_⟩
    intro S repunit hS
    exfalso
    apply h
    exact ⟨⟨S, repunit⟩, hS⟩

          _ = (3 : ℝ) * y n + (↑⌊y n * √(5 : ℝ)⌋ : ℝ) := by rw [ihn]

proof:

theorem putnam_2009_b3 : ∃ (putnam_2009_b3_solution : Set ℤ), ∀ (mediocre : ℤ → Set ℤ → Prop), ∀ (A : ℤ → ℤ), ((∀ (n : ℤ) (S : Set ℤ), mediocre n S ↔ S ⊆ Icc (1 : ℤ) n ∧ ∀ a ∈ S, ∀ b ∈ S, (2 : ℤ) ∣ a + b → (a + b) / (2 : ℤ) ∈ S) ∧ (A = fun (n : ℤ) => (↑{S : Set ℤ | mediocre n S}.ncard : ℤ))) → ({n : ℤ | n > (0 : ℤ) ∧ A (n + (2 : ℤ)) - (2 : ℤ) * A (n + (1 : ℤ)) + A n = (1 : ℤ)} = putnam_2009_b3_solution) := by

    intro mediocre A h
    have hmed : mediocre = mediocre₀ := by

      constructor
      · intro hs
        have hm : mediocre n S ↔
            S ⊆ Icc (1 : ℤ) n ∧
            ∀ a ∈ S, ∀ b ∈ S, (2 : ℤ) ∣ a + b → (a + b) / (2 : ℤ) ∈ S := h.1 n S
        have hm0 : mediocre₀ n S ↔

            ∀ a ∈ S, ∀ b ∈ S, (2 : ℤ) ∣ a + b → (a + b) / (2 : ℤ) ∈ S := h₀.1 n S
        exact hm0.mpr (hm.mp hs)

theorem putnam_2011_b2 : ∃ (putnam_2011_b2_solution : Set ℕ), ∀ (S : Set (Fin (3 : ℕ) → ℕ)), ∀ (t : ℕ), ((S = {s : Fin (3 : ℕ) → ℕ | Nat.Prime (s (0 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) ∧ Nat.Prime (s (1 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) ∧ Nat.Prime (s (2 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) ∧ ∃ (x : ℚ), (↑(s (0 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) : ℚ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (↑(s (1 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) : ℚ) * x + (↑(s (2 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) : ℚ) = (0 : ℚ)})) → (Nat.Prime t ∧ {s : Fin (3 : ℕ) → ℕ | s ∈ S ∧ ∃ (i : Fin (3 : ℕ)), s i = t}.encard ≥ (7 : ℕ∞) ↔ t ∈ putnam_2011_b2_solution) := by 
  let T : Set (Fin (3 : ℕ) → ℕ) :=

      Nat.Prime (s (0 : Fin (3 : ℕ))) ∧

name: putnam_2014_a4
proof:

theorem putnam_2014_a4 : ∃ (putnam_2014_a4_solution : ℝ), ∀ (Xrandvar : (ℕ → ℝ) → Prop), ∀ (E : (ℕ → ℝ) → (ℕ → ℝ) → ℝ), ((Xrandvar = fun (X : ℕ → ℝ) => (∀ (n : ℕ), X n ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)) ∧ ∑' (n : ℕ), X n = (1 : ℝ)) ∧ (E = fun (X f : ℕ → ℝ) => ∑' (n : ℕ), f n * X n)) → (sInf {X0 : ℝ | ∃ (X : ℕ → ℝ), Xrandvar X ∧ (E X fun (x : ℕ) => (↑x : ℝ)) = (1 : ℝ) ∧ (E X fun (x : ℕ) => (↑x : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ)) = (2 : ℝ) ∧ (E X fun (x : ℕ) => (↑x : ℝ) ^ (3 : ℕ)) = (5 : ℝ) ∧ X0 = X (0 : ℕ)} = putnam_2014_a4_solution) := by

          (∑' (n : ℕ), (fun (x : ℕ) => (↑x : ℝ) ^ (3 : ℕ)) n * X n = (5 : ℝ)) ∧
          X0 = X (0 : ℕ)}
  refine ⟨sInf S, ?_⟩
  intro Xrandvar E h
  rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  change
    sInf
      {X0 : ℝ |
        ∃ (X : ℕ → ℝ),
          ((∀ (n : ℕ), X n ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)) ∧

  constructor
  · intro hX0
    rcases hX0 with ⟨X, hXR, h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
    rcases hXR with ⟨hIcc, hsum⟩

theorem putnam_2017_a1 : ∃ (putnam_2017_a1_solution : Set ℤ), ∀ (IsQualifying : Set ℤ → Prop), ∀ (S : Set ℤ), ((∀ (S : Set ℤ), IsQualifying S ↔ (∀ n ∈ S, (0 : ℤ) < n) ∧ (2 : ℤ) ∈ S ∧ (∀ n > (0 : ℤ), n ^ (2 : ℕ) ∈ S → n ∈ S) ∧ ∀ n ∈ S, (n + (5 : ℤ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) ∈ S) ∧ (IsLeast IsQualifying S)) → (Sᶜ ∩ {n : ℤ | (0 : ℤ) < n} = putnam_2017_a1_solution) := by 
  classical
  by_cases hExists :
      ∃ (IQ : Set ℤ → Prop) (S0 : Set ℤ),
        (∀ T : Set ℤ,
            IQ T ↔
              (∀ n ∈ T, (0 : ℤ) < n) ∧
              (2 : ℤ) ∈ T ∧
              (∀ n > (0 : ℤ), n ^ (2 : ℕ) ∈ T → n ∈ T) ∧
              ∀ n ∈ T, (n + (5 : ℤ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) ∈ T) ∧
          IsLeast IQ S0
  · rcases hExists with ⟨IQ, S0, hspec0, hleast0⟩
    refine ⟨S0ᶜ ∩ {n : ℤ | (0 : ℤ) < n}, ?_⟩
    intro IsQualifying S h
    rcases h with ⟨hspec, hleast⟩
    have hEqPred : ∀ T : Set ℤ, IsQualifying T ↔ IQ T := by
      intro T
      rw [hspec T, hspec0 T]
    have hS_subset_S0 : S ⊆ S0 := by
      intro x hx
      have hIQS0 : IQ S0 := hleast0.1
      have hQualS0 : IsQualifying S0 := (hEqPred S0).2 hIQS0
      have hsub : S ⊆ S0 := hleast.2 hQualS0

      intro x hx
      have hQualS : IsQualifying S := hleast.1
      have hIQS : IQ S := (hEqPred S).1 hQualS
      have hsub : S0 ⊆ S := hleast0.2 hIQS
      exact hsub hx
    have hSetEq : S = S0 := Set.Subset.antisymm hS_subset_S0 hS0_subset_S
    simp [hSetEq]
  · refine ⟨∅, ?_⟩
    intro IsQualifying S h
    exfalso
    apply hExists
    exact ⟨IsQualifying, S, h.1, h.2⟩

import Mathlib
open Finset Function
def GameString (n : ℕ) := Fin n → Fin 3
def initialState (n : ℕ) : GameString n := fun _ => 0
def isValidMove {n : ℕ} (s1 s2 : GameString n) : Prop :=
  (∃! i : Fin n, s1 i ≠ s2 i) ∧
  ∀ i : Fin n, s1 i ≠ s2 i →
    ((s1 i).val + 1 = (s2 i).val ∨ (s2 i).val + 1 = (s1 i).val)
def IsValidGamePlay {n : ℕ} (play : List (GameString n)) : Prop :=
  play.Chain isValidMove (initialState n) ∧
  (initialState n :: play).Nodup
inductive HasWinningStrategy (n : ℕ) : List (GameString n) → Prop where
  | win (play : List (GameString n)) (s : GameString n) :
      IsValidGamePlay (play ++ [s]) →
      (∀ s', IsValidGamePlay (play ++ [s, s']) → HasWinningStrategy n (play ++ [s, s'])) →
